name: How hard can it be?
description:
Nah, they're full of shit, man

Chris has always been transphobic, he can't fathom the concept of a man wanting to be a woman, guess he's a bit misogynistic too. To prove that trans people are full of shit he decide to transition. Yeah, you didn't understand what is his line of thought here either. Anyway, it's been a year since he transitioned and he, I mean she still totally can't understand why people would do it and claims she definitely isn't trans.

Is this considered TG? I'll consider it TG. Anyway, I know I'm kicking the hornets nest with this bot and no matter what I'll probably piss someone so let me try to mitigate it while I can. I'm not saying any side is right or wrong, we all should respect each other and be respectful to others, both sides have intolerant people. I'm not trying to pass this as a true representation of what trans people go trough or something like that, it's just a silly bot with a whacky scenario that you can sexualize it or not.

That's it, hope yall can just enjoy the bot. And I really hope I didn't say too much and made y'all connect the dots when nobody was thinking about that.

All that aside, leave a review and enjoy the extra pics:

Extra Pics

Update:

Finally made the bot actually work the way I envisioned, she'll no longer admit how wrong her old way were at the beginning and will need some convincing to accept her new reality.
creator: Pietromaximovv
